title: ChargePoint Expands EV Charging Network at LMU Campus
text: ChargePoint announced that Loyola Marymount University is expanding its commitment to electrification via incremental ChargePoint chargers, the new ChargePoint software Platform and ChargePoint's Safeguard Care, helping the university meet growing demand for EV charging. The expansion at LMU represents a strategic partnership for ChargePoint to extend its presence in the education sector and demonstrate product capabilities for campus-wide electrification.
